x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Retired CIs still flagged as Installed are included in Now Assist impact analysis, causing AI to suggest remediations for, route alerts to, and assess impact on assets that no longer exist.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Update install_status for Retired and Decommissioned CIs to a non-Installed value. Navigate to cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=operational_statusINRetired,Decommissioned^install_status=1. Target: 0 lifecycle state mismatches. Ghost records pollute Now Assist impact analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c24
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Retired CIs still flagged as Installed are included in Now Assist impact analysis, causing AI to suggest remediations for, route alerts to, and assess impact on assets that no longer exist.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CI Lifecycle Management</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    ga.addQuery('operational_status', 6); // 6 = Retired (Decommissioned not present on this instance)
    ga.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var mismatched = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = mismatched + ' CIs in Retired status still flagged as Installed';

    if (mismatched === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No lifecycle state mismatches found. Now Assist impact analysis will not be polluted by ghost records from retired assets.' };
    } else if (mismatched < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' retired CIs still flagged as Installed. These ghost records will pollute Now Assist impact analysis with non-existent assets.' };
    } else if (mismatched < 1000) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' lifecycle state mismatches. Significant ghost record issue — Now Assist AI impact scope includes a large number of retired assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: mismatched + ' retired CIs still flagged as Installed. Critical lifecycle management failure — Now Assist impact analysis is heavily polluted with ghost records.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000388</number><order>160</order><remediation_guidance>Update install_status for Retired and Decommissioned CIs to a non-Installed value. Navigate to cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=operational_statusINRetired,Decommissioned^install_status=1. Target: 0 lifecycle state mismatches. Ghost records pollute Now Assist impact analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c24</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CI Lifecycle Management</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c24</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
